title: Navigation Menu
description: Add a navigation menu to the header using a <nav> element containing a <ul> with at least 3 <li> items, each with an <a> link (e.g., Home, Recipes, Submit Recipe). Style the nav: remove bullet points with list-style, and use display: inline or display: flex to make items horizontal. Give the nav a background-color.
starter_code:
# Recipe Collection Website — Step 5: Navigation Menu # Add a
with styled links. Style it to be horizontal. html = """ My Recipes

My Recipe Collection

Welcome to my favorite recipes!

Classic Pancakes

Fluffy, golden pancakes perfect for a weekend breakfast.

Ingredients

  • 2 cups flour
  • 2 eggs
  • 1 cup milk
  • 2 tbsp butter

Instructions

  1. Mix dry ingredients in a bowl
  2. Add eggs and milk, stir until smooth
  3. Heat a pan and melt butter
  4. Pour batter and cook until golden

© 2026 My Recipe Collection

""" print(html)
test_code:
assert '<nav>' in html.lower() and '</nav>' in html.lower(), 'Must include a <nav> element'
_nav_section = html.lower().split('<nav>')[1].split('</nav>')[0] if '<nav>' in html.lower() else ''
assert '<ul>' in _nav_section, 'Must include a <ul> inside the <nav>'
assert _nav_section.count('<li>') >= 3, 'Must have at least 3 <li> items in the nav'
assert '<a ' in _nav_section or '<a>' in _nav_section, 'Must include <a> links inside the nav list items'
assert _nav_section.count('<a') >= 3, 'Must have at least 3 links in the nav'
assert 'list-style' in html.lower() or 'display' in html.lower(), 'Must style the nav (list-style or display property)'
assert '<style>' in html.lower(), 'Must include a <style> block'
assert 'background-color' in html.lower(), 'Must set background-color (on body or nav)'
acceptance_criteria: A <nav> element is present inside the header
Nav contains a <ul> with at least 3 <li> items
Each list item contains an <a> link
Nav is styled to display horizontally (list-style or display)
hints: Remove bullets: nav ul { list-style: none; }
Horizontal layout: nav li { display: inline; } or nav ul { display: flex; }
